view/item/context.when: (viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.day || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.month || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.year) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'
(viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.day || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.month || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.year) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'

(viewItem =~ /^codexHistoryViewer\.(session|sessionPinned|searchSession|searchHit)\.(codex|claude)(?:\.archived)?(?:\.customTitle)?$/ || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.day || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.month || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.year) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'

(viewItem =~ /^codexHistoryViewer\.(session|sessionPinned|searchSession|searchHit)\.(codex|claude)(?:\.archived)?(?:\.customTitle)?$/ || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.day || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.month || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.year) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.pinnedView) && (viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.project.withCwd || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.relatedGroup.withCwd) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.pinnedView) && (viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.project.withCwd || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.relatedGroup.withCwd) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'
